text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby-loving Vodka and the Triple
Tiara-set Daiwa Scarlet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Provoked, Vodka decides to run in the Tulip Sho.
Maybe it's fate that two rivals on completely
different paths meet in an unexpected place like
this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The days leading up to the race are troubled, as
their conversations span from mere insults to
serious debates.
